example: He accidentally knocked over a glass of water.
The school decided to bring in new teaching methods.
Students were asked to act out the story in class.

meaning: v. 以某种态度或眼光看待
example: We should see the world with an open mind.
She spoke quietly for fear that she might wake the baby.

meaning: v. 查看；参观（房屋、场所）
example: We went to see over the new school building.
A cat suddenly jumped out from behind the door.
We got on the bus at the next stop.
I have put in an application for the program.
She picked out a gift for her friend.
He walked up to the stage confidently.
She gets up early every day.
The teacher pointed out my mistakes.
Too many trees have been cut down.
She set down her thoughts in a notebook.
